violations.text: Spray hose at food prep sink was observed leaking when in use. System to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The oven hood in the bakery area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2025

Several areas of the roof were observed in poor repair (water damage observed from interior of building). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: -wall near meat cutting room food prep sink -gaskets and door kickplate for large walk-in freezer The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Establishment does not have a certified Rhode Island Food Protection manager. Establishment has individuals with accredited food safety certificates. Application provided at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The hand-washing sink in the meat room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The deli display case was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Deli meat in the unit was observed between 50-52 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, deli meat was placed in unit for an unknown amount of time. Deli meat products were pulled from retail sale to be destroyed. List of foods to be destroyed provided during time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until it can hold an internal food temperature of 41 DF or lower. Equipment to be adjusted/repaired/replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The wall behind the prep sink in the meat room area is rusted and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided to establishment during this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The bulbs at the Grab N Go hot holding unit observed in poor repair. Bulbs observed with peeled coatings at the time of this inspection. Bulbs shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The walls in the front rotisserie prep area, walls in the back 3 bay sink area, and walls in the Produce walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Coatings observed rusted and/or peeled. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
